note: Most major freelance platforms (Toptal, Turing, Upwork) require invite-only or application-based vetting — not open registration. lotus.to appears inactive/unavailable. devn.io returned minimal content. The following is the best info available from direct site fetches.

platforms.name: Arc.dev
platforms.typesOfWork: Freelance and full-time remote work for developers, designers, product managers, marketers. Specialties include front-end, mobile, full-stack, data science.
platforms.typicalRates: Above-market pay; specific rates not publicly listed — determined by profile and negotiation
platforms.howToJoin: 1. Create a profile at https://arc.dev/talent with basic details and work experience. 2. Complete communication and technical vetting tests. 3. Receive interview invites from hiring managers. 4. Start working. Best suited for 5+ years experience and good English.

platforms.name: Gun.io
platforms.typesOfWork: Vetted software engineers — Java, Python, JavaScript, and broader full-stack development. Platform focuses on governance, compliance, and managed outcomes for enterprise clients.
platforms.typicalRates: Premium/above-market; platform positions itself as a high-stakes engineering talent layer for companies
platforms.howToJoin: Submit application via https://app.gun.io/sign-up — platform handles vetting, contracts, payroll across 100+ countries.
highlights: Vetted talent pool: ~3,950 JavaScript, ~2,820 Python, ~1,967 Java developers
Managed outcomes — platform ensures work gets done

platforms.name: Toptal
platforms.typesOfWork: Top 3% freelance talent: software engineers, designers, product managers, finance experts, executives. Predominantly senior-level.
platforms.typicalRates: Premium rates — Toptal screens for top-tier talent; rates typically $60-150+/hr depending on role
platforms.howToJoin: Apply at https://www.toptal.com/developers/apply — involves rigorous vetting: language/personality, problem-solving, and live skills evaluation. ~5% acceptance rate. No open registration.
platforms.note: Blocked by Cloudflare on fetch — info from prior knowledge

platforms.name: Turing
platforms.typesOfWork: Remote software engineers: full-stack, backend, frontend, mobile, data science, DevOps, AI/ML
platforms.typicalRates: Competitive; Turing claims above-market pay. Typically $30-100+/hr for engineers.
platforms.howToJoin: Apply at https://turing.com/developers/apply — vetting includes data science challenges and video interview. Turing is invite/application-based.
platforms.note: Blocked on fetch — info from prior knowledge

platforms.name: Upwork
platforms.registrationStatus: Open registration (free account) but competitive — Optional: Upwork Talent Cloud for vetted talent
platforms.typesOfWork: Broad freelance marketplace — software development, web development, mobile, AI/ML, design, writing, marketing, and more
platforms.typicalRates: Wide range: $5-200+/hr. Competitive pricing, especially for new freelancers. Connects to enterprise clients.
platforms.howToJoin: Create free account at https://upwork.com — complete profile, verify identity, build portfolio. Connects directly with clients who post jobs. Service fees: 10% for first $500, 5% thereafter.
highlights: Upwork Talent Cloud for vetted/managed talent tier
platforms.note: Blocked on fetch — info from prior knowledge

platforms.name: Lotus.to
platforms.howToJoin: Site unreachable at time of research
platforms.note: Site returned no content / not found. Unable to verify current status. Check directly if you have an invite code or contact.

platforms.name: Devn.io
platforms.typesOfWork: Unknown — site returned only 'Devin Doolin' (likely a personal landing redirect)
platforms.howToJoin: Site appears inactive or redirect-based — not a standard freelance platform
platforms.note: Site fetch returned minimal content. Not a verified active freelance platform.

platforms.name: CodeCanyon / Envato
platforms.typesOfWork: NOT a freelance service platform — marketplace for buying/selling code, plugins, scripts, and digital assets
platforms.typicalRates: Authors set prices for items; earns royalties on sales
platforms.howToJoin: Create author account at https://codecanyon.net — submit items for review. Envato takes 37.5-63.5% of revenue depending on exclusiveness.
highlights: Large marketplace for digital code assets
platforms.note: Wrong platform type — this is for selling code products, not freelance services

bestForDevelopers: Arc.dev — open, active, vet-tested, remote freelance jobs
Upwork — open registration, most accessible but competitive
Toptal / Turing — invite-only, but highest-paying if you qualify
summary.noOpenRegistration: Toptal, Turing, lotus.to, devn.io are all application/invite-only or inactive. None have true open registration in 2026.
summary.actionable: Apply to Arc.dev or Gun.io immediately — both have open applications as of April 2026.
